description: Baseline for the Addison webview: it may relay IPC to the Agent Core via the app's own `send_to_core` / `store_provider_key` commands (allowed by default, no permission needed) and listen for the shell's `core-message` / `core-status` events. It gets NOTHING else — no direct filesystem, network, keychain, or shell access (spec §1.3, §8).
